title: Origin of Tardis Creators
description: A modpack that combines the Origins, Create, and Tardis Refined mods along with some extras and optimisation.
body:
A modpack that combines the Origins, Create, and Tardis Refined mods along with some extra mods that modify terrain generation and adds new dimentions to make exploring the the world more interesting and includes optimisation mods like sodium, visual/interactive enhancement from Do a Barrel Roll, Rolling Down in the Deep, and Distant Horizons simple voice chat, and voice chat interaction, and A easer time exploring the world with Xeros Worldmap/Minimap mods, and sophisticated Backpacks.


This modpack is made for those who want to fly arond in their own tardis like the Doctor, Create machines and/or factories, experiance playing as a differnt creature, or just explore the world.

For those who want a simple but at the same time complex mod pack to play with freinds or by yourself where you can play the game how ever you want.

Check the Mod list of the version you are playing for full list.

And Check if it is the server version when downloading.
